cover.title: measuring ai roi as headcount you didn't hire is easy to fake, and easy to regret
cover.sub: the layoff math feels clean. it's also the number you'll cut first. here's the honest one.

slides.title: the honest measure
slides.body: throughput and capability per senior you actually trust. not bodies removed. work shipped, at a standard you'd sign off on.

slides.title: what to track
items: review pass rate on agent output
senior time moved from typing to deciding

slides.title: none of these is a layoff
slides.body: and that's the point. frame ai as headcount saved and you'll cut it the first bad quarter. frame it as capacity and it survives.

cta.title: the honest way to measure agent roi
cta.sub: capacity per senior you trust, not headcount you didn't hire.
